ogTitle: Narrapumelap South vs Narrawong: Climate Safety

heading: Narrapumelap South vs Narrawong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narrapumelap South, Victoria and Narrawong, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Narrawong has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Narrapumelap South (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narrapumelap South or Narrawong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narrapumelap South has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Narrawong scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narrapumelap South scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Narrawong scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narrapumelap South or Narrawong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Narrawong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
